---
layout: default
title: "PM Modi’s Indonesia Visit and Domestic Political Developments"
date: 2026-07-08T10:32:28.551751+00:00
summary: "PM Modi addresses the Indonesian Parliament while domestic political tensions rise over electoral rolls, Rajya Sabha polls, and legal challenges to reservations"
run_time_ist: "4:02PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:02PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>PM Modi’s historic address:</strong> Prime Minister Modi became the first Indian PM to address the Indonesian Parliament, where he advocated for UNSC reforms, inclusive development, and rejected expansionism while notably referencing Jawaharlal Nehru.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxPa3JGVEVEY0RJY2R3ZXFJQW1HU2k1eWtDYTdCUkt0ZGY1S0llUm9HSERzTVZsVTNnNm8yMnNoX0JxSjVDN3NCYmtOb3FjQ2FXQWw2MTdIaUl2dmh2THVNTm9Lc3lnNjREQThLNEMyUzhlR3E3NnVJRUtVLVFBeng3clp2OTVPUE9iR0RlSVVIUjVlMnl2U2NlVk1OdW0tVHh6S0VnWFFlYnZybVYzcTh6SGZ6cVY?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Electoral and legislative disputes:</strong> The BJP and JD(S) have petitioned the Election Commission regarding alleged irregularities in Karnataka&#x27;s voter roll revision, while the INDIA bloc prepares to engage in the upcoming Union Budget discussions in Parliament.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipwFBVV95cUxOLTJlMDdqUWZMXzdEdFNQLXJwOVpJMk1pN0YwRDY4dEdnY3JXN21WS3lDMDFEQXFtbWEzaURpSzZ5SkJZdXNTbGZheGRLUlZnZDU4TlM3cHpldHA5U18yZUxNZ2tFcTdST1NpbXBENHhVLUdIS0JaN3FfV3F3YVIyenNyUDFZYzdTNWpRZExScHRFV0VlQ2NGclR0WjNIYUZCZGRDcjdxbw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Rajya Sabha and legal shifts:</strong> The BJP is poised to sweep West Bengal&#x27;s Rajya Sabha polls following the TMC&#x27;s decision not to contest, even as the Tamil Nadu government challenges a High Court verdict concerning reservation status for converts to Islam in the Supreme Court.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Judicial restraint in academics:</strong> The Supreme Court has declined to intervene in Kerala’s KEAM 2026 mark standardization policy, reinforcing the principle of limited judicial review in academic and technical matters.</li>
</ul>
